headline: Analysts Bullish on Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) Following Hexagon AB’s Design and Engineering Division Acquisition
summary: Cadence Design Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ:CDNS) earns a place on our 13 stocks with consistent growth to buy right now. Approximately 88% of covering analysts maintain bullish ratings for Cadence Design Systems (NASDAQ:CDNS), indicating that analyst sentiment regarding the company remains strong.
